task_completion.description: The document contains substantive content derived from the source JSON data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text in the OpenOffice Writer document includes required terms such as 'Vasquez', 'Permian', and 'environmental justice'.

task_completion.description: The document uses a serif font (11pt or 12pt) and 1-inch margins.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font dropdown in the toolbar shows a serif font (e.g., 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif') and size '11' or '12'. The horizontal and vertical rulers indicate margins of approximately 1 inch (2.54 cm) on the edges.

task_completion.description: The document includes Heading 1 and 2 structure and an auto-generated Table of Contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents is visible (typically with gray field shading). The style dropdown in the toolbar shows 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' when the cursor is on section titles, and there are multiple distinct sections (minimum 6 Heading 1s expected).

task_completion.description: Page numbers are included in the document footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages contains visible page numbers.

task_completion.description: A Budget Justification section exists with a table summarizing budget categories and amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A structured table is visible in the document under a 'Budget Justification' heading. The table must contain the budget figures '349,875' (or '349875') and '85,500'.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window displays 'NSF_SES2415837_ProjectDescription.odt'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenOffice Writer application open with menus being clicked, text being typed or pasted, and formatting being applied, rather than just a terminal window running a script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents is auto-generated, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents entries have a gray background (field shading) characteristic of auto-generated fields in OpenOffice, or the 'Insert Index/Table' dialog box is visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The budget summary uses an actual table structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Table gridlines are visible around the budget data, or the Table formatting toolbar appears when the cursor is inside the budget section, proving it is not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved exactly as 'NSF_SES2415837_ProjectDescription.odt'. It must contain the terms 'Vasquez', 'Permian', and 'environmental justice'. The document should have at least 6 Heading 1 sections and 1-inch (2.54 cm) margins. The budget justification table must include the total budget of 349,875 and PI salary of 85,500.
